name: claude-session-suite
description: The full lifecycle of a Claude Code session in one marketplace: spawn it (claude-remote), keep it alive (claude-session-keeper), move it between machines (claude-session-teleport)

plugins.name: claude-remote
plugins.description: Launch Claude Code Remote Control sessions in a detached tmux pane and get the claude.ai/code URL

plugins.name: claude-session-keeper
plugins.description: Persist long-running Remote Control / tmux sessions across reboots and crashes — self-register + self-heal

plugins.name: claude-session-teleport
plugins.description: Move a live Claude Code chat session between machines — clone or migrate, respawn in tmux with Remote Control and a handoff briefing
